grades.expectation: Response provides a structured checklist of pre-exchange items
grades.reason: Comprehensive 12-point structured checklist covering all major pre-exchange items

grades.expectation: Response mentions specific protocol stages or sections
grades.reason: References 'Law Society Conveyancing Protocol' generally but doesn't cite specific protocol stages, sections or numbered requirements

grades.expectation: Response covers key items: searches currency, mortgage offer, deposit, insurance, signed contracts
grades.reason: Covers all key items - searches (section 3), mortgage offer (section 4), deposit (section 5), insurance (section 7), and contract details (section 1)

grades.expectation: Response references the protocol as source (not just general best practice)
grades.reason: Explicitly references 'Law Society Conveyancing Protocol' and frames advice as checking 'against the Protocol' throughout
